items.title: APTA Members Unite to Advance Payment Advocacy Via New SPARC Forum and Pledge
items.summary: APTA has launched the SPARC Forum and the APTA Payment Advocacy Pledge to empower members in driving meaningful payment reform and strengthening the future of the physical therapy profession, especially regarding payer advocacy in states.
items.curatedReason: APTA推出SPARC论坛和支付倡导承诺，旨在推动支付改革，加强物理治疗师服务。积极参与此类倡导活动，是提升物理治疗行业地位和保障合理报销的关键。
items.titleZh: APTA成员团结起来，通过新的SPARC论坛和承诺推进支付倡导
items.summaryZh: APTA推出了SPARC论坛和APTA支付倡导承诺，旨在赋能成员推动有意义的支付改革，并加强物理治疗专业，尤其是在各州的支付方倡导方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA launched the SPARC Forum and Payment Advocacy Pledge to drive payment reform and strengthen physical therapist services. Actively participating in such advocacy is key to elevating the PT profession and ensuring fair reimbursement.

items.title: Dry Needling State Laws
items.summary: APTA provides an updated infographic (as of April 2026) detailing state laws on dry needling practice by physical therapists in the US, highlighting which states allow, prohibit, or have no specific provisions.
items.curatedReason: APTA提供了各州干针执业法律的最新概况（截至2026年4月）。你在美国执业干针时，务必查阅你所在州的具体法律，确保合规操作。
items.titleZh: 干针执业州法律
items.summaryZh: APTA提供了一份更新至2026年4月的图表，详细说明了美国各州关于物理治疗师干针执业的法律，明确了哪些州允许、禁止或没有具体规定。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA provides an updated overview of state laws on dry needling practice (as of April 2026). When practicing dry needling in the US, you must consult your state's specific laws to ensure compliant operation.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores physiotherapists' experiences treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes around facilitating well-being, embracing bodily experiences, and building alliances based on safety and respect.
items.curatedReason: 本研究提示，处理脑瘫儿童和青少年疼痛时，你需将患者福祉、躯体体验和医患信任放在首位。治疗不止于躯体，更要关注患儿的整体感受和安全感，这能帮你更有效建立治疗联盟。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做贡献。” 物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师在治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年时的经验，研究揭示了通过身体治疗实践促进福祉、将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的中心起点，以及在安全、信任和尊重基础上与儿童建立联盟等关键主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that when treating pain in children and adolescents with cerebral palsy, you should prioritize patient well-being, embodied experience, and therapeutic alliance. Treatment extends beyond the physical; focus on the child's overall feelings and sense of safety to build a more effective therapeutic relationship.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Let's talk about sex (and gender) after ACL injury: a ...
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated sex and gender differences in self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes after ACL injury, showing distinct patterns between males and females.
items.curatedReason: ACL损伤后，男性和女性在自报活动量和膝关节结局上存在显著差异。你在制定康复方案时，必须考虑这些性别因素，尤其是女性在重返运动和功能结局方面可能面临独特挑战。
items.titleZh: 让我们谈谈ACL损伤后的性别问题：一项关于自报活动和膝关节相关结局的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了ACL损伤后自报活动量和膝关节相关结局的性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Significant sex differences exist in self-reported activity and knee-related outcomes following ACL injury. You must account for these sex-specific factors when developing rehabilitation plans, as females, in particular, may face unique challenges in returning to sport and achieving functional outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是自报结局，可能存在回忆偏差。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on self-reported outcomes, which may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Action observation therapy in pediatric cerebral palsy: an ...
items.summary: An fNIRS-based randomized controlled trial investigated the cortical responses and balance improvements from Action Observation Therapy (AOT) in pediatric cerebral palsy patients, a group of neurodevelopmental disorders affecting movement and posture.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT探索了儿童脑瘫患者行动观察疗法（AOT）对皮层反应和平衡的影响。如果你在实践中应用AOT，这项研究提供了初步的神经生理学和临床证据。
items.titleZh: 儿童脑瘫行动观察疗法：基于fNIRS的皮层反应和平衡研究——一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项基于fNIRS的随机对照试验研究了儿童脑瘫患者行动观察疗法（AOT）对皮层反应和平衡的影响。脑瘫是一组影响运动和姿势的神经发育障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT explores the effects of action observation therapy (AOT) on cortical responses and balance in pediatric cerebral palsy patients. If you apply AOT in practice, this study provides preliminary neurophysiological and clinical evidence.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步随机对照试验，可能样本量较小，需更大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial, likely with a small sample size, and requires validation by larger studies.

items.title: Handgrip and leg strength and risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged ≥ 80 years: a prospective HUNT study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A prospective HUNT study examined handgrip and leg strength and the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged ≥80 years, a population underrepresented in fall research, finding reduced muscle strength as a recognized risk factor for falls.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性研究量化了80岁及以上老年人的握力、腿部力量与严重跌倒伤害风险之间的关系。在评估老年患者跌倒风险时，应特别关注其肌肉力量指标。
items.titleZh: 80岁及以上老年人握力、腿部力量与严重跌倒伤害风险：一项前瞻性HUNT研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性HUNT研究调查了80岁及以上老年人的握力、腿部力量与严重跌倒伤害风险之间的关系。该年龄组在跌倒研究中代表性不足，研究发现肌肉力量减弱是公认的跌倒风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective study quantifies the relationship between handgrip and leg strength and the risk of severe fall injuries in adults aged 80 and above. When assessing fall risk in elderly patients, you should pay particular attention to their muscle strength indicators.
items.limitation: 研究未明确是否控制了所有潜在混杂因素，可能存在残余混杂。
items.limitationEn: The study does not specify whether all potential confounding factors were controlled for, and residual confounding may exist.

items.title: Frailty in patients undergoing video-assisted thoracoscopic surgery for lung cancer: a narrative review of assessment, outcomes and prehabilitation | World Journal of Surgical Oncology
items.summary: A narrative review summarizes frailty assessment, outcomes, and prehabilitation in patients undergoing video-assisted thoracoscopic surgery (VATS) for lung cancer, noting that older adults are increasingly considered for such procedures.
items.curatedReason: 对于肺癌胸腔镜手术患者，虚弱评估应是术前康复的关键环节。请务必在术前识别虚弱个体，并根据这篇综述的建议，制定个性化的预康复方案以优化术后恢复。
items.titleZh: 肺癌胸腔镜手术患者的虚弱评估、结局和术前康复：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述总结了肺癌胸腔镜手术（VATS）患者的虚弱评估、结局和术前康复，指出老年人越来越多地被考虑进行此类手术。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients undergoing VATS for lung cancer, frailty assessment must be a critical component of prehabilitation. Ensure you identify frail individuals pre-operatively and, as this review suggests, develop personalized prehabilitation programs to optimize post-operative recovery.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，未提供量化证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may have selection bias and does not provide quantified evidence.

items.title: Development and validation of the pulmonary rehabilitation Kinesiophobia scale for patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease | BMC Pulmonary Medicine
items.summary: This study developed and validated the Pulmonary Rehabilitation Kinesiophobia Scale for patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in China, as kinesiophobia is a significant barrier to pulmonary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发并验证了COPD患者肺康复运动恐惧症量表。如果你在临床中遇到COPD患者对运动有恐惧，可以使用这个新工具进行评估。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者肺康复运动恐惧症量表的开发与验证
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发并验证了用于中国慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者的肺康复运动恐惧症量表，运动恐惧症是肺康复的一个重要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed and validated the Pulmonary Rehabilitation Kinesiophobia Scale for patients with COPD. If you encounter COPD patients with kinesiophobia in your practice, you can use this new tool for assessment.
items.limitation: 量表在中国COPD患者中开发和验证，其跨文化适用性尚待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The scale was developed and validated in Chinese COPD patients, and its cross-cultural applicability needs further validation.

items.title: Stage-specific predictors of exercise adherence after percutaneous coronary intervention: a prospective multicenter study | BMC Cardiovascular Disorders
items.summary: A prospective multicenter study characterized stage-specific predictors of exercise adherence after percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI), aiming to address how poor long-term adherence compromises exercise efficacy.
items.curatedReason: PCI术后患者的运动依从性是长期康复成功的关键。这份研究识别了不同阶段的预测因子，这意味着你应根据患者所处的恢复阶段，采取更有针对性的策略来提高其运动依从性。
items.titleZh: 经皮冠状动脉介入治疗后运动依从性的阶段特异性预测因子：一项前瞻性多中心研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性多中心研究描述了经皮冠状动脉介入治疗（PCI）后运动依从性的阶段特异性预测因子，旨在解决长期依从性差如何影响运动疗效的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise adherence is crucial for long-term rehabilitation success after PCI. This study identifies stage-specific predictors, meaning you should implement more targeted strategies to improve exercise adherence based on the patient's recovery phase.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性，无法建立因果关系，预测因子可能受其他未测量因素影响。
items.limitationEn: The study is observational and cannot establish causality; predictors may be influenced by other unmeasured factors.

items.title: Association of Diaphragmatic Crus Thickness Assessed by Computed Tomography with Diaphragmatic Excursion and Exercise Capacity in Patients with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease | Lung
items.summary: This research explored the association of diaphragmatic crus thickness, assessed by CT, with diaphragmatic excursion and exercise capacity in patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), as diaphragmatic dysfunction contributes to exercise intolerance.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现COPD患者膈肌脚厚度与膈肌活动度、运动能力相关。在评估COPD患者时，可以关注膈肌影像学指标，这可能提示潜在的运动不耐受。
items.titleZh: CT评估的膈肌脚厚度与慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者膈肌活动度及运动能力的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了通过CT评估的膈肌脚厚度与慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者膈肌活动度及运动能力之间的关系，因为膈肌功能障碍会导致运动不耐受。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found an association between diaphragmatic crus thickness and diaphragmatic excursion and exercise capacity in COPD patients. When assessing COPD patients, you can focus on diaphragmatic imaging indicators, which may suggest potential exercise intolerance.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面，无法确立因果关系，且膈肌脚厚度与运动耐量的具体机制尚需深入研究。
items.limitationEn: The study is cross-sectional, unable to establish causality, and the specific mechanism linking diaphragmatic crus thickness to exercise tolerance requires further in-depth research.

items.title: A systematic review of current evidence on clinical outcomes of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques in sacroiliac joint dysfunction.
items.summary: This systematic review aims to evaluate the clinical efficacy of lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques for sacroiliac joint dysfunction (SIJD), searching studies published between January 2021 and December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 如果你在处理骶髂关节功能障碍（SIJD）患者，这份系统综述会帮你梳理腰椎滚动和改良 SIMS 手法治疗的现有证据，指导你未来临床决策。
items.titleZh: 腰椎滚动与改良SIMS手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍临床结局的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在评估腰椎滚动和改良SIMS手法治疗骶髂关节功能障碍（SIJD）的临床疗效，检索了2021年1月至2025年12月期间发表的研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're treating patients with sacroiliac joint dysfunction (SIJD), this systematic review helps you synthesize current evidence on lumbar roll and modified SIMS manipulation techniques, guiding your future clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 本系统综述注册在 PROSPERO，但目前尚未提供具体结果，无法评估其最终结论和潜在局限。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review is registered in PROSPERO but has not yet provided specific results, making it impossible to assess its ultimate conclusions and potential limitations.

items.title: ASM (Ambulatory Specialty Model) Frequently Asked ...

items.titleZh: ASM（门诊专科模式）常见问题解答 | CMS

items.curatedReasonEn: CMS's ASM (Ambulatory Specialty Model) FAQ provides information on new payment models. If you practice in the US, this directly relates to your future reimbursement and revenue models, and you should closely monitor and evaluate its impact on your practice.

items.title: ACCESS (Advancing Chronic Care with Effective, Scalable ...
items.summary: CMS has launched the ACCESS (Advancing Chronic Care with Effective, Scalable Solutions) Model, a 10-year program with rolling start dates, aiming to support people with Medicare with chronic health conditions.
items.curatedReason: CMS的ACCESS（通过有效、可扩展解决方案推进慢性护理）模式是一个为期10年的滚动启动项目，旨在改善慢性病管理。如果你在美国执业并治疗慢性病患者，了解此模式的参与要求和潜在机遇，有助于你调整服务模式。
items.titleZh: ACCESS（通过有效、可扩展解决方案推进慢性护理）模式 | CMS
items.summaryZh: CMS推出了ACCESS（通过有效、可扩展解决方案推进慢性护理）模式，这是一个为期10年的滚动启动项目，旨在支持患有慢性疾病的Medicare参保人。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS's ACCESS (Advancing Chronic Care with Effective, Scalable Solutions) Model is a 10-year rolling start program aimed at improving chronic disease management. If you practice in the US and treat chronic disease patients, understanding the participation requirements and potential opportunities of this model can help you adjust your service model.

items.title: Video-based examination of patients with shoulder pain: a scoping review | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current research on video-based examination of patients with shoulder pain, noting that while musculoskeletal examinations can be performed via video with good validity, evidence is limited.
items.curatedReason: 如果你正考虑开展远程医疗，这项范围综述确认了视频检查评估肩痛患者的可行性，但请注意，现有证据仍有限。这意味着在全面推广前，仍需更多高质量研究来支持其有效性和可靠性。
items.titleZh: 肩痛患者的视频检查：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇范围综述旨在梳理和汇编当前关于肩痛患者视频检查的研究，指出尽管肌骨检查可通过视频进行并具有良好有效性，但现有证据有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're considering telehealth, this scoping review confirms the feasibility of video-based examination for shoulder pain, but be aware that current evidence remains limited. More high-quality research is needed to fully support its efficacy and reliability before widespread adoption.
items.limitation: 范围综述仅提供证据概览，无法对视频检查的诊断准确性进行荟萃分析或提供量化证据。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of the evidence and cannot meta-analyze or provide quantified evidence on the diagnostic accuracy of video examination.

items.title: Single-session pelvic prehabilitation improves continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy: a prospective comparative study | Journal of Robotic Surgery
items.summary: A prospective comparative study found that single-session pelvic prehabilitation improved continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy, which is the functional complication with the greatest negative impact on patient quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性研究支持单次盆底肌术前康复能显著改善机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术后的控尿能力。你可以考虑将术前盆底肌训练纳入你的泌尿外科患者管理方案。
items.titleZh: 单次盆底术前康复改善机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术后控尿恢复：一项前瞻性比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性比较研究显示，单次盆底术前康复能改善机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术（RARP）后的尿失禁恢复，PPI是RARP术后对患者生活质量影响最大的功能并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective study supports that single-session pelvic prehabilitation significantly improves continence recovery after robot-assisted radical prostatectomy. You can consider incorporating pre-operative pelvic floor muscle training into your urology patient management protocol.
items.limitation: 研究设计为前瞻性比较研究，非随机对照试验，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a prospective comparative study, not an RCT, and may have confounding factors.

items.title: Bypass neural interfaces for paralysis: clinical translation, challenges and future directions | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This review discusses the clinical translation, challenges, and future directions of neural bypass interfaces for paralysis, which re-establish functional communication across disrupted neural pathways by linking neural intent to effector activation downstream of the lesion.
items.curatedReason: 神经旁路接口是瘫痪治疗的未来方向。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注这类技术的发展和临床转化潜力，为未来可能出现的创新康复策略做好准备。
items.titleZh: 瘫痪的神经旁路接口：临床转化、挑战和未来方向
items.summaryZh: 本综述探讨了瘫痪治疗中神经旁路接口的临床转化、挑战和未来方向。这些系统通过连接神经意图与病灶下游的效应器激活，重建了受损神经通路的功能性沟通。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neural bypass interfaces represent a future direction for paralysis treatment. As a physical therapist, you need to monitor the development and clinical translation potential of these technologies to prepare for innovative rehabilitation strategies that may emerge.
items.limitation: 作为综述，本文并未提供新的临床数据或干预效果的量化证据。
items.limitationEn: As a review, this article does not provide new clinical data or quantified evidence of intervention efficacy.

items.title: Predictors of discharge destination of stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation center, including difficult discharge cases | Egyptian Rheumatology and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This study identifies predictors of discharge destination for stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation centers, including factors contributing to difficult discharge cases, which can significantly influence patient care.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了影响卒中患者康复出院去向的关键预测因子。尽早评估这些因素，你就能更主动地为患者规划出院方案，尤其要识别并提前介入那些可能导致出院困难的病例。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者从住院康复中心出院去向的预测因素，包括难出院病例
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了卒中患者从住院康复中心出院去向的预测因素，包括难以出院的病例，这对于患者护理具有重要影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identifies key predictors of discharge destination for stroke patients from inpatient rehabilitation. By assessing these factors early, you can proactively plan discharge pathways for your patients, particularly by identifying and intervening early in cases likely to have difficult discharges.
items.limitation: 研究未指明具体研究设计，可能存在观察性研究的局限性。
items.limitationEn: The specific study design is not indicated, and limitations inherent to observational studies may exist.

items.title: Diagnostic accuracy of biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A study evaluated the diagnostic accuracy of Biodex balance system stability indices under single- and dual-task conditions in individuals with chronic ankle instability (CAI), aiming to differentiate individuals with CAI from healthy controls.
items.curatedReason: Biodex平衡系统在诊断慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）时，双任务测试可能比单任务测试提供更敏感的诊断信息。在临床实践中，考虑将双任务评估纳入你的CAI诊断流程。
items.titleZh: Biodex平衡系统在单任务和双任务条件下诊断慢性踝关节不稳的稳定性指数诊断准确性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了Biodex平衡系统在单任务和双任务条件下诊断慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）的稳定性指数诊断准确性，旨在区分CAI患者与健康对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: For diagnosing chronic ankle instability (CAI) with the Biodex balance system, dual-task testing may provide more sensitive diagnostic information than single-task testing. Consider incorporating dual-task assessments into your CAI diagnostic workflow in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，未能评估这些指标对未来损伤的预测能力。
items.limitationEn: The study has a cross-sectional design and does not evaluate the predictive ability of these indices for future injuries.

items.title: Single leg vertical jump performance identifies knee ...

items.titleZh: 单腿垂直跳表现可识别ACL重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷
items.summaryZh: 研究显示，单腿垂直跳表现可以识别前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that single leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits at return to sport after ACL reconstruction in male athletes. You should consider single leg vertical jump as a key assessment metric when evaluating post-ACL patients.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅为男性运动员，结果对外推至女性或其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were only male athletes, and caution should be exercised when extrapolating the results to women or other populations.

items.title: Distinct Movement-Related Cortical Control Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury: A Scoping Review | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to synthesize evidence on cortical activity during motor tasks in ACL patients, as distinct brain activity has been reported, but comprehensive evidence on neural differences and their impact on motor performance is limited.
items.curatedReason: ACL损伤后可能存在独特的运动相关皮层活动。虽然目前全面证据有限，但这提示你应关注神经机制在ACL康复中的作用，未来康复干预可能需要靶向这些皮层差异。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后独特的运动相关皮层控制：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在综合关于ACL患者运动任务中皮层活动的证据，尽管已有报道称存在独特的脑活动，但关于神经差异及其对运动表现潜在影响的全面证据仍然有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: Distinct cortical activity during motor tasks may exist following ACL injury. While comprehensive evidence is currently limited, this suggests you should consider the role of neural mechanisms in ACL rehabilitation; future interventions might need to target these cortical differences.
items.limitation: 范围综述仅提供证据的概述，不提供荟萃分析或效应量。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review only provides an overview of the evidence and does not offer meta-analysis or effect sizes.

items.title: Prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction at a tertiary center | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This research investigated the prevalence and risk factors of medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction at a tertiary center.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了初次ACL重建术患者内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素。这表明你在术前评估时，对存在相关风险因素的患者应提高警惕，有助于早期发现和干预，避免遗漏诊断。
items.titleZh: 三级中心初次前交叉韧带重建术患者内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了在一家三级中心接受初次前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术的患者中，内侧半月板斜坡损伤的患病率和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identifies the prevalence and risk factors for medial meniscal ramp lesions in patients undergoing primary ACL reconstruction. This indicates you should be more vigilant during pre-operative assessment for patients with relevant risk factors, aiding early detection and intervention to avoid missed diagnoses.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，患病率和风险因素的推断可能受限于回顾性数据。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, and inferences about prevalence and risk factors may be limited by retrospective data.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy: a pilot study | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A pilot study investigated the biomechanical effects of powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses in people with diparetic cerebral palsy, who often experience gait impairments like excessive knee flexion and ankle dorsiflexion during stance.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究提示，动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器可能改善双瘫脑瘫患者的步态生物力学。你可以密切关注这些新型矫形器的发展，评估其在你患者群体中的潜在应用价值。
items.titleZh: 动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫脑瘫患者生物力学影响的初步研究
items.summaryZh: 一项初步研究调查了动力膝关节矫形器和踝足矫形器对双瘫脑瘫患者的生物力学影响。双瘫脑瘫患者常在站立期出现膝关节过度屈曲和踝关节过度背屈等步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study suggests that powered knee orthoses and articulated ankle-foot orthoses may improve gait biomechanics in individuals with diparetic cerebral palsy. You should monitor the development of these novel orthoses and evaluate their potential application in your patient population.
items.limitation: 作为一项初步研究，样本量小，结果尚需大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: As a pilot study, the sample size is small, and the results need to be validated by larger studies.

items.title: Can slow and (un)steady still win the race? A narrative review of developmental gait characteristics and clinical implications in children born preterm | European Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: A narrative review explores developmental gait characteristics and clinical implications in children born preterm, highlighting that independent walking reflects the integration of neuromuscular maturation, postural control, and sensorimotor coordination.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提醒你，早产儿的步态发展是神经肌肉成熟、姿势控制和感觉运动协调的综合体现。在评估和干预早产儿步态时，你必须全面考量这些相互关联的因素。
items.titleZh: 慢而（不）稳也能赢？早产儿发育性步态特征及临床意义的叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述探讨了早产儿的发育性步态特征及其临床意义，强调独立行走反映了神经肌肉成熟、姿势控制和感觉运动协调的整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reminds you that gait development in preterm children is a comprehensive reflection of neuromuscular maturation, postural control, and sensorimotor coordination. When assessing and intervening in preterm gait, you must consider these interconnected factors holistically.
items.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未进行系统性证据综合。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, it may suffer from selection bias and does not provide systematic evidence synthesis.

items.title: Age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood: an analysis from the SUNRISE International Study | European Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: An analysis from the SUNRISE International Study provides age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood, addressing the limitation that most reference data derive from high-income countries.
