items.titleZh: 幼儿粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位曲线：SUNRISE国际研究的分析
items.summaryZh: SUNRISE国际研究的一项分析提供了幼儿粗大和精细运动技能的年龄和性别特异性百分位曲线，旨在解决大多数运动技能参考数据来自高收入国家的局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides age- and sex-specific percentile curves for gross and fine motor skills in early childhood from an international study, offering strong generalizability. You can use these new international reference data to assess children's motor development.
items.limitation: 数据主要来源于高收入国家，可能对外推到其他文化和经济背景有限。
items.limitationEn: The data primarily originate from high-income countries, which may limit their generalizability to other cultural and economic contexts.

items.title: Characterization of physical health variables across fall risk appraisal groups: a cross-sectional study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A cross-sectional study characterized physical health variables across fall risk appraisal groups, providing insights into the physical health differences among older adults based on their perceived fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 你应了解，老年人对跌倒风险的自我感知与其身体健康变量（如平衡能力、肌肉力量）存在关联。这份观察研究提示我们，在评估和干预跌倒风险时，不能忽视患者的主观感受。
items.titleZh: 跌倒风险评估组间的身体健康变量特征：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究描述了不同跌倒风险评估组的身体健康变量特征，为老年人基于感知跌倒风险的身体健康差异提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understand that older adults' self-perception of fall risk is linked to their physical health variables, such as balance and muscle strength. This observational study suggests that when assessing and intervening for fall risk, patient-reported perceptions should not be overlooked.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系，也无法提供干预效果信息。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional studies cannot establish causality and do not provide information on intervention effects.

items.title: Low-load blood flow restriction training vs high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults: a literature review | Sport Sciences for Health
items.summary: A literature review compared low-load blood flow restriction training versus high-load resistance training for sarcopenia in older adults, addressing the lack of clear guidelines for optimal exercise strategies.
items.curatedReason: 如果你正在考虑老年肌少症患者的训练方案，这篇综述提示，低负荷血流限制训练可能与高负荷阻力训练有相似效果。这为你在临床实践中拓展治疗选择提供了初步证据，尤其适用于无法承受高负荷的老年患者。
items.titleZh: 低负荷血流限制训练与高负荷阻力训练治疗老年肌少症的比较：一篇文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇文献综述比较了低负荷血流限制训练与高负荷阻力训练在老年肌少症患者中的应用，旨在解决缺乏最佳运动策略明确指南的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're considering training protocols for sarcopenia in older adults, this review suggests low-load blood flow restriction training may offer similar benefits to high-load resistance training. This provides preliminary evidence for expanding treatment options in your practice, especially for elderly patients unable to tolerate high loads.
items.limitation: 作为文献综述，可能未进行系统性筛选和质量评估，存在潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a literature review, it may not have undergone systematic screening and quality assessment, posing potential biases.

items.title: Exploratory analysis of a Phase I cardiac rehabilitation pathway on anxiety and autonomy in patients undergoing PCI: a narrative nursing and transactional stress-coping perspective | BMC Cardiovascular Disorders
items.summary: An exploratory secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial investigated the associations between a Phase I cardiac rehabilitation pathway and anxiety and autonomy in patients undergoing PCI.
items.curatedReason: 这份探索性分析提示，PCI术后的I期心脏康复不仅改善生理功能，也可能显著降低患者的焦虑水平并增强自主性。这意味着在早期康复中，心理支持和赋能同样重要。
items.titleZh: PCI术后患者I期心脏康复路径对焦虑和自主性影响的探索性分析：一项叙述性护理和交互应激应对视角
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验的探索性次级分析，从叙述性护理和交互应激应对视角，调查了I期心脏康复路径与PCI术后患者焦虑和自主性之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory analysis suggests that Phase I cardiac rehabilitation after PCI may not only improve physiological function but also significantly reduce patient anxiety and enhance autonomy. This implies that psychological support and empowerment are equally important in early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 作为一项探索性次级分析，本研究的原始RCT并非为此结局设计，可能缺乏足够的统计效力。
items.limitationEn: As an exploratory secondary analysis, the original RCT was not designed for this outcome and may lack sufficient statistical power.

items.title: Intensity is in the eye of the beholder: a qualitative photovoice study of perceptions of physical activity intensity for people with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease | BMC Pulmonary Medicine
items.summary: A qualitative photovoice study investigated perceptions of physical activity intensity for people with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), noting that health benefits are greatest for higher intensity activity.
items.curatedReason: 对于COPD患者，对体力活动强度的感知可能影响其参与度。这份定性研究提醒你，在指导时需理解患者视角，并采用易于理解的语言和方法，帮助他们安全有效地进行更高强度的活动。
items.titleZh: 强度因人而异：一项关于慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者体力活动强度感知的定性影像志研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性影像志研究调查了慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者对体力活动强度的感知，研究指出高强度活动对健康益处最大。
items.curatedReasonEn: For people with COPD, perceptions of physical activity intensity can influence their engagement. This qualitative study reminds you to understand the patient's perspective during guidance and use accessible language and methods to help them safely and effectively engage in higher intensity activities.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的通用性有限，主要反映特定受访者的感知。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative research findings is limited, primarily reflecting the perceptions of specific interviewees.

items.title: Psychometric validation of the Cardiac Rehabilitation ...
items.summary: This study conducted a psychometric validation of the Cardiac Rehabilitation Barriers Scale Revised (CRBS-R) for hybrid delivery, aiming to assess its suitability for use in evolving cardiac rehabilitation models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究验证了混合模式心脏康复障碍量表（CRBS-R）的心理测量学特性。如果你在实践中推行混合模式康复，这个工具可以帮助你识别患者依从性的潜在障碍。
items.titleZh: 混合模式心脏康复障碍量表修订版（CRBS-R）的心理测量学验证
items.summaryZh: 本研究对混合模式心脏康复障碍量表修订版（CRBS-R）进行了心理测量学验证，旨在评估其在不断发展的心脏康复模式中的适用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you are implementing or evaluating hybrid cardiac rehabilitation, the CRBS-R scale is now validated for hybrid delivery. Using this tool will help you more effectively identify and address potential barriers patients may face in hybrid rehabilitation, thereby improving adherence.
items.limitation: 心理测量学验证研究，未直接评估混合模式康复的临床疗效或障碍干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This psychometric validation study did not directly assess the clinical efficacy of hybrid cardiac rehabilitation or the effectiveness of barrier interventions.

items.title: APTA Master Class Series Brings Immersive, In-Person Learning to PTs and PTAs
items.summary: APTA has launched its Master Class Series to provide immersive, in-person learning for PTs and PTAs, offering practical skills clinicians can immediately apply, as the profession evolves and needs more than passive learning.
items.curatedReason: APTA推出Master Class系列课程，为物理治疗师提供沉浸式线下学习机会。这提示你在选择继续教育时，APTA提供了更多实践技能导向的选择。
items.titleZh: APTA大师班系列课程为物理治疗师提供沉浸式线下学习
items.summaryZh: APTA推出了大师班系列课程，为物理治疗师和物理治疗师助理提供沉浸式线下学习，旨在提供临床医生可以立即应用的实用技能，以应对行业发展对被动学习之外的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA has launched its Master Class Series, offering immersive, in-person learning opportunities for physical therapists. This suggests that APTA provides more practical, skill-oriented options when you choose continuing education.

items.title: Tailored exercise and manual therapy versus standardised ...
items.summary: A feasibility randomized controlled trial compared tailored exercise and manual therapy versus standardized exercise for patients with shoulder subacromial pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性随机对照试验为肩峰下疼痛的个性化运动和手法治疗与标准化运动方案的比较提供了初步数据。这有助于你思考个性化方案的潜在益处。
items.titleZh: 个性化运动和手法治疗与标准化运动方案治疗肩峰下疼痛患者的比较：一项可行性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性随机对照试验（Otago MASTER试验）旨在比较个性化运动和手法治疗与标准化运动方案对肩峰下疼痛患者的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility RCT provides preliminary data comparing tailored exercise and manual therapy to standardized exercise for subacromial shoulder pain. This helps you consider the potential benefits of individualized programs.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，样本量小，尚不能得出明确的疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility study with a small sample size, and definitive conclusions on efficacy cannot be drawn yet.

items.title: Minimally invasive versus open transforaminal lumbar interbody fusion for low grade lumbar spondylolisthesis: a systematic review and meta-analysis | Spine Deformity
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared minimally invasive versus open transforaminal lumbar interbody fusion for low grade lumbar spondylolisthesis, aiming to determine if reduced access morbidity compromises construct durability.
items.curatedReason: 对于低度腰椎滑脱的患者，微创与开放手术的比较虽然是外科医生关注的焦点，但你作为康复师需要了解其术后差异。这篇综述提示你，不同手术方式可能影响术后康复方案的制定和预期恢复时间。
items.titleZh: 微创与开放式经椎间孔腰椎椎体间融合术治疗低度腰椎滑脱：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了微创与开放式经椎间孔腰椎椎体间融合术治疗低度腰椎滑脱的疗效，旨在探讨减少入路创伤是否会影响结构持久性。
items.curatedReasonEn: While the comparison between minimally invasive and open surgery for low-grade lumbar spondylolisthesis is primarily for surgeons, as a therapist, you need to be aware of the post-operative differences. This review suggests that different surgical approaches may influence the design of post-operative rehabilitation protocols and expected recovery times.
items.limitation: 研究主要比较外科手术方式，未直接评估物理治疗干预的有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily compares surgical approaches and does not directly assess the effectiveness of physical therapy interventions.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of 5-aminolevulinic acid photodynamic therapy for cervical squamous intraepithelial lesion: a systematic review and meta-analysis | Lasers in Medical Science
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the efficacy and safety of 5-aminolevulinic acid photodynamic therapy (5-ALA PDT) for cervical squamous intraepithelial lesion (SIL) by systematically searching PubMed and other databases.
items.curatedReason: 5-ALA光动力疗法是治疗宫颈鳞状上皮内病变的一种医学手段。虽然这不是物理治疗的直接范畴，但了解其疗效和安全性可丰富你的医学知识储备，以便与相关科室医生进行更有效的沟通。
items.titleZh: 5-氨基乙酰丙酸光动力疗法治疗宫颈鳞状上皮内病变的疗效和安全性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析通过系统检索PubMed及其他数据库，评估了5-氨基乙酰丙酸光动力疗法（5-ALA PDT）治疗宫颈鳞状上皮内病变（SIL）的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: 5-ALA photodynamic therapy is a medical treatment for cervical squamous intraepithelial lesions. While not directly within the scope of physical therapy, understanding its efficacy and safety can enhance your medical knowledge, facilitating more effective communication with physicians in related specialties.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是一种特定光动力疗法在妇科领域的应用，与物理治疗的直接相关性较低。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on the application of a specific photodynamic therapy in gynecology, with limited direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: Photobiomodulation for primary wound healing and patient-reported outcomes after esthetic crown lengthening surgery: A pilot randomized clinical trial | Lasers in Medical Science
items.summary: A pilot randomized clinical trial evaluated the efficacy of photobiomodulation (PBM) on primary wound healing and patient-centered outcomes following esthetic clinical crown lengthening with osteotomy.
items.curatedReason: PBM 对口腔手术后伤口愈合的初步 RCT 显示出积极信号，提示它在软组织修复中可能发挥作用。虽然是口腔领域，但你可借鉴其研究设计，考虑 PBM 在物理治疗相关术后恢复中的潜力。
items.titleZh: 美学冠延长手术后光生物调节对初级伤口愈合和患者报告结局的影响：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机临床试验评估了光生物调节（PBM）对美学临床冠延长伴截骨术后初级伤口愈合和患者中心结局的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests PBM may aid wound healing after oral surgery. While from the dental field, the findings hint at PBM's potential in soft tissue repair. Consider its research design if you're exploring PBM for post-op recovery in PT settings.
items.limitation: 作为初步随机临床试验，样本量可能较小，结果需要更大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: As a pilot randomized clinical trial, the sample size may be small, and the results need to be validated by larger studies.

items.title: Combined effects of Er: YAG laser irradiation and GLUMA in the treatment of occlusal dentine hypersensitivity induced by tooth wear: a randomized controlled trial | European Journal of Medical Research
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial evaluated the therapeutic effect of Er:YAG laser irradiation combined with GLUMA on dentine hypersensitivity (DH) induced by tooth wear, aiming to provide clinical evidence for DH treatment.
items.curatedReason: Er:YAG 激光联合 GLUMA 治疗牙本质过敏的 RCT 提供了激光在牙科中快速缓解症状的证据。这提示我们，特定波长的激光可能在处理敏感问题上具有跨领域的应用潜力。
items.titleZh: Er:YAG激光照射联合GLUMA治疗牙齿磨损引起咬合牙本质过敏的联合效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验评估了Er:YAG激光照射联合GLUMA对牙齿磨损引起的牙本质过敏（DH）的治疗效果，旨在为DH的治疗提供临床证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT on Er:YAG laser combined with GLUMA for dentine hypersensitivity shows laser's potential for rapid symptom relief in dentistry. It suggests that specific laser wavelengths might have cross-disciplinary applications for hypersensitivity issues.
items.limitation: 研究关注牙本质过敏的口腔治疗，与物理治疗的直接相关性较低。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on oral treatment for dentine hypersensitivity, with limited direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: Association between disease duration, severity, and treatment outcome of office-based blue laser therapy for benign vocal fold lesions | European Archives of Oto-Rhino-Laryngology
items.summary: This study investigates the association between disease duration, severity, and treatment outcome of office-based blue laser therapy for benign vocal fold lesions.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了疾病持续时间、严重程度与办公室蓝光激光疗法治疗良性声带病变结局之间的关系。虽然是耳鼻喉科领域，但可以作为你了解激光疗法应用范围的拓展。
items.titleZh: 疾病持续时间、严重程度与办公室蓝光激光疗法治疗良性声带病变结局之间的关系
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了疾病持续时间、严重程度与办公室蓝光激光疗法治疗良性声带病变结局之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study explores prognostic factors for blue laser therapy in benign vocal fold lesions. It reminds us that disease duration and severity can be key variables influencing treatment outcomes for any laser therapy, even across different anatomical sites.
items.limitation: 研究关注耳鼻喉科领域特定激光疗法，与物理治疗的直接相关性较低。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on specific laser therapy in the ENT field, with limited direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: Reported health-condition history profiles among adults with documented or self-reported autism seeking autism-affirming telehealth care: an exploratory latent class analysis | Molecular Autism
items.summary: An exploratory latent class analysis examined reported health-condition history profiles among adults with documented or self-reported autism seeking autism-affirming telehealth care, as these individuals often report a range of physical and mental health histories.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性分析揭示了寻求远程医疗的自闭症成年患者多样的健康史。如果你服务这类群体，需认识到他们可能伴随多种身心健康问题，远程问诊时要特别留意个体化的评估和支持。
items.titleZh: 寻求自闭症肯定性远程医疗护理的成人自闭症患者健康状况史概况：一项探索性潜在类别分析
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性潜在类别分析调查了寻求自闭症肯定性远程医疗护理的成人自闭症患者的健康状况史概况，因为这些个体通常报告多种身心健康状况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory analysis highlights the diverse health histories of autistic adults seeking telehealth. If you work with this population, recognize they may have various co-occurring physical and mental health issues, requiring individualized assessment and support during teleconsultations.
items.limitation: 研究为探索性，且仅针对寻求特定远程医疗服务的自闭症成人，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is exploratory and targets only adults with autism seeking specific telehealth services, so its generalizability is limited.

items.title: Content validity, reliability, and agreement between in-person and video-call assessments of the modified bradykinesia rating scale (MBRS).
items.summary: This methodological study, following COSMIN guidelines, found adequate content validity for the Modified Bradykinesia Rating Scale (MBRS) and assessed its test-retest and inter-rater reliability, as well as agreement between in-person and video-call assessments for individuals with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 改良运动迟缓评定量表（MBRS）在远程视频评估中的信效度表现良好，这意味着你可以放心地通过远程医疗手段评估帕金森患者的运动迟缓。这为居家康复和偏远地区患者提供了便利，扩大了执业范围。
items.titleZh: 改良运动迟缓评定量表（MBRS）内容效度、信度以及现场与视频评估一致性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项遵循 COSMIN 指南的方法学研究评估了改良运动迟缓评定量表（MBRS）的内容效度、重测信度、评估者间信度以及现场与视频通话评估的一致性，结果支持其作为帕金森病运动迟缓评估工具的可用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Modified Bradykinesia Rating Scale (MBRS) demonstrates good reliability and validity for remote video assessments. This means you can confidently use telehealth to assess bradykinesia in Parkinson's patients, expanding access to care for home-bound or remote individuals.
items.limitation: 该研究的样本量未明确提及，且未提供关键效度指标的详细数字。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly state the sample size or provide detailed figures for key validity metrics.

items.title: The Association of Depression, Anxiety, and Quality of Life with Sexual Function in Young-to-Middle-Aged Stroke Patients: A Case-Control Study.
items.summary: This case-control study of 30 stroke patients and 30 matched controls found that stroke patients had significantly higher total Arizona Sexual Experience Scale scores (19.3 ± 6.6 vs. 13.0 ± 3.1, p < 0.001) and a higher prevalence of sexual dysfunction (p = 0.004), alongside declines in sexual satisfaction.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者的性功能障碍显著高于对照组，且与抑郁、焦虑和生活质量显著相关。在康复计划中，别忘了纳入对性健康和心理健康的评估与干预，这会显著影响患者的生活质量和依从性。
items.titleZh: 中青年卒中患者抑郁、焦虑、生活质量与性功能障碍的关联：一项病例对照研究
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 30 名卒中患者和 30 名匹配对照的病例对照研究发现，卒中患者的性经历量表总分显著更高（19.3 ± 6.6 vs. 13.0 ± 3.1, p < 0.001），性功能障碍患病率更高（p = 0.004），且性满意度显著下降。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients experience significantly higher rates of sexual dysfunction compared to controls, and this is strongly associated with depression, anxiety, and quality of life. Ensure your rehabilitation plans include assessment and intervention for sexual and psychological health, as this can significantly impact patient quality of life and adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本量（n=30）的病例对照研究，结果的外推性有限，且无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a small case-control study (n=30), limiting generalizability and preventing the establishment of causality.

items.title: Individuals with Disabilities Receiving Care from a Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly
items.summary: A study on individuals with disabilities enrolled in a Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) found that health outcomes (function, mood, quality of life, community engagement) and care satisfaction improved after one year compared to baseline, while healthcare utilization was similar to national PACE benchmarks.
items.curatedReason: PACE 项目对残障年轻患者的服务质量和健康结局有积极影响。这提示对特定患者群体，PACE 可能是一种有效的照护模式，扩展了其传统上以老年为主的服务范围。
items.titleZh: 全方位老年照护项目（PACE）中残障人士的照护效果
items.summaryZh: 一项关于参与全方位老年照护项目（PACE）的残障人士的研究发现，一年后患者的健康结局（功能、情绪、生活质量和社区参与）和护理满意度较基线均有所改善，且医疗利用率与全国 PACE 基准相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PACE program positively impacts the quality of care and health outcomes for younger patients with disabilities, suggesting it could be an effective model for this specific patient group, expanding beyond its traditional focus on the elderly.
items.limitation: 本研究的对照组并非随机对照，且无法排除其他混杂因素对结局的影响。
items.limitationEn: This study's control group was not a randomized control, and other confounding factors influencing outcomes could not be excluded.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Information and communication technologies in implementation strategies promoting allied health professionals' guideline adherence in post-acute stroke care: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified information and communication technologies (ICTs) used in implementation strategies for stroke guidelines in post-acute care, noting their underexplored potential to improve allied health professionals' adherence.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述提醒你，中风后康复指南的依从性仍不足。尽管信息和通信技术（ICTs）有望提升依从性，但目前其应用和效果仍需深入探索，别指望它能立刻成为改变实践的核心工具。
items.titleZh: 信息和通信技术在促进专职医疗人员在中风后护理中遵守指南方面的实施策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别并映射了在卒中急性期后护理中，促进专职医疗人员遵守指南的信息和通信技术（ICTs），指出这些技术在实施策略中的应用潜力尚未充分挖掘。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights the inadequate adherence to post-stroke rehabilitation guidelines. While ICTs show promise for improving adherence, their current application and efficacy warrant further exploration; do not expect them to be an immediate game-changer in practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，主要侧重于识别和映射现有技术，而非评估其干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily focuses on identifying and mapping existing technologies rather than evaluating their interventional effects.

items.title: Effectiveness of an individualised swimming and education programme for chronic low back pain (EduSwim): a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=?) compared an individualized swimming and education program (8 weeks via 4 telehealth PT sessions) with education alone for chronic low back pain, finding significant improvement in disability (RMDQ) at 8 weeks for the intervention group.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实了在慢性下腰痛管理中，个性化游泳加健康教育的方案，通过远程物理治疗提供，能显著改善患者的残疾程度。这提示我们可以在远程康复中更积极地探索水上运动干预。
items.titleZh: 个体化游泳与教育项目对慢性下腰痛疗效的随机对照试验（EduSwim）
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=?）比较了个性化游泳与教育项目（8周，通过4次远程物理治疗会话）与单纯教育对慢性下腰痛的疗效，发现干预组在8周时残疾程度（RMDQ）有显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that an individualized swimming and education program, delivered via telehealth physical therapy, significantly improves disability in chronic low back pain. This suggests a more proactive exploration of aquatic exercise interventions in telerehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究的随访期较短（8周），长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively short follow-up period (8 weeks), so long-term effects are not yet clear.

items.title: In adult patients with brainstem strokes, does dysphagia rehabilitation improve health-related outcomes compared to usual care for inpatients? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis (12 studies, 443 participants) synthesized evidence on dysphagia rehabilitation for inpatients with brainstem stroke, categorizing interventions into traditional swallowing therapy or device inclusion, finding overall effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析有力支持了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽康复的有效性。无论采用传统疗法还是包含器械的疗法，吞咽康复都应是这类患者早期管理的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 脑干卒中成人住院患者吞咽障碍康复是否改善健康相关结局：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析（12项研究，443名参与者）综合了脑干卒中住院患者吞咽障碍康复的证据，将干预措施分为传统吞咽疗法或包含器械的疗法，发现总体有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis strongly supports the effectiveness of dysphagia rehabilitation for inpatients with brainstem strokes. Whether traditional or device-assisted, dysphagia rehabilitation should be a crucial part of early management for these patients.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学异质性可能影响荟萃分析的整体结论强度。
items.limitationEn: Methodological heterogeneity among included studies might affect the overall strength of the meta-analysis's conclusions.

items.title: Responsiveness of the Arabic version of the lower extremity functional scale in individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: This observational study evaluated the responsiveness of the Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) in 74 individuals with lower extremity musculoskeletal disorders, finding its change scores correlated with other outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表（LEFS）表现出良好的反应性，支持其在阿拉伯语患者群体中作为物理治疗效果评估工具的有效性。
items.titleZh: 下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表的反应性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究评估了74名下肢肌肉骨骼疾病患者中阿拉伯语版下肢功能量表（LEFS）的反应性，发现其变化分数与其他结果测量指标相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Arabic version of the Lower Extremity Functional Scale (LEFS) demonstrated good responsiveness, supporting its validity as an outcome measure for physical therapy in Arabic-speaking populations.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，且样本量相对较小（74名参与者），可能限制了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study with a relatively small sample size (74 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: This case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after receiving spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, even when symptoms didn't align with typical pain referral patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提示，即使上肢疼痛表现不符合典型脊柱放射模式，脊柱功能障碍仍可能是原发原因。对上肢疼痛患者进行全面的脊柱评估是有价值的。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛患者的脊柱检查与治疗：病例系列
items.summaryZh: 这个病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者，他们在接受脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告的残疾程度临床显著改善，即使症状不符合典型的疼痛放射模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that even when upper extremity pain doesn't follow typical spinal referral patterns, spinal dysfunction can still be a primary source. A comprehensive spinal assessment for upper extremity pain patients is valuable.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级较低，无法推断因果关系或普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: This case series has a low level of evidence, making it impossible to infer causality or general applicability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Authors' reply to: letter to the editor: occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation (OTHER): a feasibility study of post-stroke intervention for transition to home.
items.summary: This article is an authors' reply to a letter to the editor regarding a feasibility study on occupational therapy at home E-rehabilitation for post-stroke patients transitioning home.
items.curatedReason: 这篇作者回复信件虽未提供新数据，但其上下文关注卒中后家庭康复的远程治疗可行性，提示 PT 行业对扩大远程医疗服务的兴趣和讨论。
items.titleZh: 作者回复：致编辑信函：居家职业治疗电子康复（OTHER）：卒中后居家过渡干预的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 本文是作者对一封致编辑信函的回复，该信函涉及卒中后患者居家过渡的居家职业治疗电子康复可行性研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this author's reply doesn't provide new data, its context focusing on telerehabilitation feasibility for post-stroke home rehabilitation suggests ongoing PT industry interest and discussion in expanding telehealth services.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: VR 辅助的物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛、身体功能和平衡有显著改善作用。面对传统康复效果不佳的患者，你可以考虑将 VR 作为一种有效的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 5 项随机对照试验的系统综述和 Meta 分析显示，与传统康复相比，虚拟现实辅助物理治疗能显著改善膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002）、身体功能（SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003）和平衡（SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002）。
items.curatedReasonEn: VR-assisted physiotherapy significantly improves pain, physical function, and balance in patients with knee osteoarthritis. For patients where traditional rehabilitation is insufficient, consider VR as an effective adjunctive treatment.
items.limitation: 本系统综述仅纳入 5 项 RCT，样本量相对较小，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review included only 5 RCTs, with a relatively small sample size, which may limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study of 958 adults aged ≥55 years with stroke and MCI found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation significantly reduced the risk of developing post-stroke dementia compared with physical rehabilitation alone (HR = 0.70, 95% CI: 0.55-0.89).
items.curatedReason: 结合物理康复和认知康复能显著降低卒中后痴呆的风险。在为卒中患者制定康复计划时，你应积极考虑整合认知康复，特别是对于存在轻度认知障碍的患者。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知康复联合治疗与卒中后痴呆的相关性：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究（纳入 958 名 55 岁以上患卒中和轻度认知障碍的成年人）发现，与单独物理康复相比，物理康复与认知康复相结合能显著降低卒中后痴呆的发生风险（HR = 0.70, 95% CI: 0.55-0.89）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation significantly reduces the risk of post-stroke dementia. When designing rehabilitation plans for stroke patients, you should actively consider integrating cognitive rehabilitation, especially for those with mild cognitive impairment.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在未测量的混杂因素，不能完全排除因果反转。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, unmeasured confounders may exist, and reverse causality cannot be entirely ruled out.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional study in three UK stroke rehabilitation units found that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors, showing good diagnostic accuracy compared to the Rivermead Perceptual Assessment Battery (RPAB).
items.curatedReason: 牛津视觉知觉筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性期卒中幸存者中能有效检测视觉知觉障碍。这为临床实践提供了一个早期筛查工具，有助于你及时识别并干预患者的视觉知觉问题。
items.titleZh: 牛津视觉知觉筛查在亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中检测视觉知觉障碍的早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国三家卒中康复机构进行的横断面研究发现，牛津视觉知觉筛查（OxVPS）能有效检测亚急性期成人卒中幸存者的视觉知觉障碍，与 Rivermead 知觉评估量表（RPAB）相比具有良好的诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors. This provides an early screening tool for clinical practice, helping you timely identify and intervene in patients' visual perceptual issues.
items.limitation: 这是一项早期诊断准确性研究，需要更大规模和多中心验证以确认其广泛适用性。
items.limitationEn: This is an early diagnostic accuracy study that requires larger-scale and multi-center validation to confirm its widespread applicability.

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial in military and veteran healthcare settings found that a combined clinical practice guideline (CPG) and psychologically informed physical therapy (PIPT) implementation strategy significantly reduced LBP-related disability, pain, and downstream healthcare utilization.
items.curatedReason: 针对低级别腰痛，CPG 和 PIPT 结合实施策略显著改善了残疾和疼痛，并降低了下游医疗利用率。这对管理慢性腰痛的你来说，意味着应该积极整合心理知情物理治疗框架，并采用基于证据的主动和手法治疗。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE 试验：评估临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗对军人与退伍军人腰痛结局影响的 stepped-wedge 整群随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军人与退伍军人的 stepped-wedge 整群随机试验发现，结合临床实践指南（CPG）和心理知情物理治疗（PIPT）的实施策略显著降低了腰痛相关的残疾、疼痛，并减少了下游医疗服务利用。
items.curatedReasonEn: For low back pain, the combined CPG and PIPT implementation strategy significantly improved disability and pain, and reduced downstream healthcare utilization. This means you should actively integrate a psychologically informed physical therapy framework and employ evidence-based active and manual treatments in managing chronic LBP.
items.limitation: 本研究采用 stepped-wedge 随机试验设计，可能存在学习效应和时间偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study used a stepped-wedge randomized trial design, which may introduce learning effects and temporal bias.

items.title: Measurement Characteristics and Clinical Utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test Among People with Stroke
items.summary: This study aims to evaluate the measurement characteristics and clinical utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) among people with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究将评估 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）在卒中患者中的测量特性和临床实用性。作为卒中康复医师，你将能更好地理解和应用 6MWT，从而更准确地评估患者功能。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 6 分钟步行测试的测量特性和临床实用性
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估 6 分钟步行测试（6MWT）在卒中患者中的测量特性和临床实用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: When assessing walking ability in stroke patients, the 6MWT is a common tool. This study will deeply evaluate its measurement characteristics and clinical utility, likely providing you with clearer guidance to interpret test results more precisely and optimize rehabilitation goal setting.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation applied to the radial nerve, combined with a 4-week exercise program, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain.
items.curatedReason: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗对慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者在中长期内有益。这提示你可以将此疗法作为辅助手段，帮助改善患者疼痛和功能，但并非独立疗法。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激对慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者中长期益处：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 49 名慢性外侧肘部疼痛患者的随机、双盲、假对照试验发现，超声引导下经皮桡神经电刺激结合 4 周运动方案，在中长期内能带来益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation combined with exercise provides mid- and long-term benefits for patients with chronic lateral elbow pain. This suggests you can consider this therapy as an adjunct to improve patient pain and function, but not as a standalone treatment.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（49 例），可能限制结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (49 participants) may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT in China with 54 post-stroke dysphagia patients found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) for 14 days was superior to continuous nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 间歇性口食管管饲（IOE）在卒中后吞咽困难患者中可能比持续鼻胃管饲（NG）更能降低胃食管反流风险并促进吞咽恢复。你可以考虑 IOE 作为一种更优的营养支持方式。
items.titleZh: 间歇性口食管管饲与鼻胃管饲对卒中后吞咽困难患者胃动力、反流风险和临床疗效的多模式评估：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国大学附属医院进行的单中心随机对照试验（54 名卒中后吞咽困难患者）发现，间歇性口食管管饲（IOE）14 天在降低反流风险和促进吞咽恢复方面优于持续鼻胃管饲（NG）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) may be more effective than continuous nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in reducing reflux risk and promoting swallowing recovery for post-stroke dysphagia patients. You can consider IOE as a superior method of nutritional support.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验，且样本量较小（54 人），结果的普遍性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center trial with a small sample size (54 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: A secondary data analysis from an RCT with 84 patients investigated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, evaluating adherence to pain thresholds, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了关于慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在运动干预中疼痛阈值依从性的数据。在制定康复计划时，你需要注意患者对疼痛阈值和治疗计划的依从性，这会影响长期效果。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（包括疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名慢性肩袖肌腱病患者进行的随机对照试验的二次数据分析，评估了患者在为期 26 周的运动干预中对两种疼痛阈值方案、运动和物理治疗的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides data on pain threshold adherence in patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy during exercise intervention. When developing rehabilitation plans, you need to consider patient adherence to pain thresholds and treatment protocols, as this impacts long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 该研究为二次数据分析，聚焦于依从性而非临床疗效，且样本量为 84 人。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis focusing on adherence rather than clinical efficacy, with a sample size of 84 participants.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT in Brazil with 145 participants (72 Pilates, 73 home-based exercises) found that a Pilates exercise program may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain from a healthcare and societal perspective.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，在巴西，普拉提对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能优于家庭锻炼。在向患者推荐普拉提时，你可以此作为成本效益的参考，尤其是在资源受限的环境下。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益比较：一项基于试验的经济学评价
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验的经济学评价显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动方案对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益可能优于居家锻炼（共 145 名参与者，普拉提组 72 人，居家组 73 人）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that Pilates may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil. You can use this as a cost-effectiveness reference when recommending Pilates to patients, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 研究仅在巴西进行，结果的普适性可能受地理和医疗系统差异影响。
items.limitationEn: Conducted only in Brazil, the generalizability of the results may be affected by geographical and healthcare system differences.

items.title: Correlation of Motor-Task Related Brain Activation Changes With Motor Performance Changes Induced by Constraint-Induced Therapy After Stroke.
items.summary: A study with 42 hemiparetic stroke participants undergoing CIMT during subacute and chronic periods evaluated changes in motor-task related brain activation using fMRI and their relationship to functional recovery assessed via the Wolf Motor Function Test (WMFT).
items.curatedReason: CIMT 确实能改善脑卒中患者的运动功能。这项包含 42 例亚急性和慢性期偏瘫卒中患者的研究提示，CIMT 引起的运动相关脑激活变化可能与其功能恢复有关。目前它仍是机制性研究，不会改变你的临床实践，但有助于我们深入理解 CIMT 的作用通路。
items.titleZh: 卒中后约束诱导疗法引起的运动任务相关脑激活变化与运动功能恢复的相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 42 名偏瘫卒中患者在亚急性期和慢性期接受约束诱导疗法（CIMT）的研究，评估了运动任务相关脑激活变化与通过 Wolf 运动功能测试（WMFT）评估的功能恢复之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: CIMT demonstrably improves motor function in stroke patients. This study, involving 42 hemiparetic stroke participants in subacute and chronic phases, suggests that CIMT-induced changes in motor-task related brain activation may correlate with functional recovery. While mechanistic, this research won't change your clinical practice, but it deepens our understanding of CIMT's pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，结论不能直接推导为临床实践改变。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, and its conclusions cannot be directly translated into changes in clinical practice.

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 27 Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing over 6 weeks enhanced dynamic postural stability during gait more than textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 对于帕金森病患者，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示的训练可能比单独使用纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性和步态参数。你可以考虑将这种多感官整合方法引入患者步态康复方案。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者通过纹理鞋垫和听觉提示训练改善步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名帕金森病患者（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）的随机对照试验发现，为期 6 周的纹理鞋垫与听觉提示相结合的训练，比单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练更能提高步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For Parkinson's disease patients, training combining textured insoles and auditory cues may improve dynamic postural stability and gait parameters more effectively than textured insoles or walking training alone. You can consider incorporating this multi-sensory integration approach into patient gait rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（27 人），且随访期较短（6 周），可能影响结果的可靠性和长期外推性。
items.limitationEn: The small sample size (27 participants) and short follow-up period (6 weeks) may affect the reliability and long-term generalizability of the results.

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Shanghai, China, involving 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals, explored facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention using the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提供了卒中幸存者及其家属和医疗专业人员对二级预防健康行为的促进因素和障碍的见解。这能帮助你更好地理解患者面临的挑战，从而设计更具针对性的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 探索卒中幸存者健康行为的促进因素和障碍：一项多视角定性研究（患者、家属和医疗专业人员）
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国上海进行的定性研究，通过访谈 17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家庭照护者和 11 名医疗专业人员，探讨了卒中后健康行为（与二级预防相关）的促进因素和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study offers insights into facilitators and barriers to health behaviors for secondary prevention from the perspectives of stroke survivors, families, and healthcare professionals. This can help you better understand the challenges patients face and design more targeted rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果不具备量化和外推性，仅反映特定人群的经验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study results are not quantifiable or generalizable, reflecting only the experiences of a specific population.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review following PRISMA-ScR guidelines mapped and synthesized current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, focusing on study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects, searching five databases up to December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了 tSCS 在卒中康复中的现有证据。尽管证据分散且质量不一，但它表明 tSCS 作为一个新兴的非侵入性神经调节手段，未来可能成为现有康复治疗的有效补充，值得我们继续关注其 RCTs 结果。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激用于卒中康复：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项遵循 PRISMA-ScR 指南的范围综述，通过检索五个数据库（截至 2025 年 12 月），绘制并综合了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）用于卒中康复的现有证据，重点关注研究设计、刺激参数、结局测量和报告效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes current evidence on tSCS in stroke rehabilitation. While the evidence is fragmented and heterogeneous, it suggests that tSCS, as an emerging non-invasive neuromodulation approach, may complement existing rehabilitation therapies in the future. We should watch for upcoming RCT results.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估或荟萃分析，仅提供证据图谱，不能得出确切疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not conduct quality assessments or meta-analyses, providing only an evidence map and not definitive efficacy conclusions.

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigated the association between undernutrition and survival, reamputation-free survival, quality of life (QoL), wound healing, mobility, and work status post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation.
items.curatedReason: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后更高的再截肢率或死亡率、更低的活动能力和更差的生活质量相关。这提醒你在处理此类患者时，必须重视营养评估和干预，将其作为康复计划的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后更高再截肢率或生存率、更低活动能力和更低生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究调查了营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后生存率、无再截肢生存期、生活质量、伤口愈合、活动能力和工作状态之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Undernutrition is associated with a higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility, and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation. This reminds you that when treating such patients, nutritional assessment and intervention must be prioritized as a critical component of the rehabilitation plan.
items.limitation: 这是一项纵向观察性研究，只能表明相关性而非因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a longitudinal observational study, which can only indicate correlation, not causation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: This study protocol describes a modified Ghost System, combining action observation and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery, replacing VR with iPad-based observation and a wristband vibrator. This single-arm feasibility trial will enroll 10 adults post-DRF fixation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究协议描述了一种改进的 Ghost 系统，结合动作观察和振动刺激，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复。作为一种新颖的辅助工具，你可以关注其未来可行性研究结果，但目前仍是初步探索。
items.titleZh: 改进型 Ghost 系统结合动作观察和振动刺激促进桡骨远端骨折术后恢复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究协议描述了一种改进型 Ghost 系统，结合动作观察和振动刺激，旨在促进桡骨远端骨折术后恢复，将 VR 头显替换为 iPad 观察和腕带式振动器。这项单臂可行性试验将招募 10 名桡骨远端骨折内固定术后成人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol describes a modified Ghost system, combining action observation and vibration stimulation, for rehabilitation after distal radius fracture surgery. As a novel adjunct tool, you can follow its future feasibility study results, but it remains an initial exploration.
items.limitation: 这是一个单臂临床可行性研究协议，仅评估可行性，不提供疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol, evaluating only feasibility and not providing efficacy data.

items.title: Eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation: A masterclass.
items.summary: This masterclass discusses eccentric cycling for ACL-R rehabilitation, noting that early progressive eccentric exercise, starting around three weeks post-operation in selected patients, shows potential benefits for quadriceps atrophy and strength deficits, also enhancing return-to-sport performance.
items.curatedReason: 离心骑行训练在 ACL-R 康复中越来越普遍，早期渐进性离心运动对股四头肌萎缩和力量不足可能带来益处。你可以将其作为一种早期且有效的力量训练手段，但需要注意个体化和循序渐进。
items.titleZh: ACL-R 康复中的离心骑行：大师课
items.summaryZh: 这篇大师课探讨了 ACL-R 康复中的离心骑行，指出早期渐进性离心运动（在选定患者中术后约三周开始）对股四头肌萎缩和力量不足显示出潜在益处，还能提高重返运动的表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: Eccentric cycling training is increasingly common in ACL-R rehabilitation, with early progressive eccentric exercise potentially benefiting quadriceps atrophy and strength deficits. You can consider it as an early and effective strength training method, but individualization and gradual progression are crucial.
items.limitation: 本篇为专家视角（masterclass），非系统综述或 RCT，结论需要更多高等级证据支持。
items.limitationEn: This is an expert perspective (masterclass), not a systematic review or RCT, and its conclusions require more high-level evidence for support.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perspectives and lived experiences of 4 private practice physical therapy health care systems participating in the Fibromyalgia TENS In Physical Therapy Study (FM-TIPS), providing insights into clinical research in non-academic settings.
items.curatedReason: 你如果在非学术环境中开展临床研究，这项定性研究非常有参考价值。它通过 4 家参与 FM-TIPS 研究的私营物理治疗诊所的经验，揭示了这类机构参与临床试验的障碍与促进因素。你会发现，理解这些实际挑战对于设计有效的合作模式至关重要。
items.titleZh: 参与务实临床试验的私营物理治疗医疗系统视角：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了参与纤维肌痛经皮电神经刺激物理治疗研究（FM-TIPS）的四家私营物理治疗医疗系统的视角和亲身经历，为非学术环境下的临床研究提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you conduct clinical research in non-academic settings, this qualitative study is highly relevant. It explores the perspectives of 4 private practice physical therapy healthcare systems participating in the FM-TIPS study, revealing barriers and facilitators to their clinical trial involvement. You'll find that understanding these practical challenges is crucial for designing effective collaborative models.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具备普遍性，且仅基于 4 个 HCS 的视角。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its results are not generalizable and are based solely on the perspectives of 4 HCS.

items.title: Effectiveness of different modes of digital health interventions for sarcopenia in older adults: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different modes of digital health interventions for sarcopenia in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性，这项系统综述和网络Meta分析为你提供了不同模式的相对疗效证据。你可以根据这些发现，选择最适合患者的数字化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 不同模式数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性：一项系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络Meta分析评估了不同模式数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality systematic review and network meta-analysis clarifies the effectiveness of various digital health intervention modes for sarcopenia in older adults. When designing digital rehabilitation programs for your patients, select the most suitable mode based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的比较结果受限于不同数字干预模式之间的研究数量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The comparative results of network meta-analysis are limited by the number and heterogeneity of studies across different digital intervention modes.

items.title: Contralateral Balance Training Improves Postural Control and Functional Recovery After Arthroscopic Anterior Talofibular Ligament Repair: A Prospective, Randomized, Single-Blind Trial
items.summary: A prospective, randomized, single-blind trial found that contralateral balance training significantly improved postural control and functional recovery after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair.
items.curatedReason: 对于踝关节前距腓韧带修复术后的患者，健侧平衡训练是有效的康复手段。它能显著改善姿势控制和功能恢复，可以考虑纳入术后康复方案。
items.titleZh: 健侧平衡训练可改善关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复：一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验发现，健侧平衡训练显著改善了关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Contralateral balance training is an effective rehabilitation method for patients after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair. It significantly improves postural control and functional recovery and should be considered for inclusion in postoperative rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲试验，可能存在一定的偏倚风险。
items.limitationEn: This study was a single-blind trial, which may introduce a risk of bias.

items.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A pilot randomized controlled trial found that resistance-band shoulder exercise improved pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis.
items.curatedReason: 阻力带肩部训练对糖尿病粘连性囊炎患者的疼痛、活动度和功能障碍有改善作用。尽管是小样本RCT，其积极效果提示我们，在临床实践中可以尝试将阻力带训练纳入糖尿病患者的肩周炎康复计划。
items.titleZh: 阻力带肩部训练对糖尿病粘连性囊炎患者疼痛、活动度和功能障碍的影响：一项试点随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验发现，阻力带肩部训练改善了糖尿病粘连性囊炎患者的疼痛、活动度和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Resistance-band shoulder exercise can improve pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis. While a small pilot RCT, its positive effects suggest that resistance-band training could be incorporated into rehabilitation plans for diabetic patients with frozen shoulder.
items.limitation: 本研究为试点随机对照试验，样本量小，结果需在大规模研究中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a small sample size; results need further validation in larger studies.

related.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.

items.title: Effectiveness of Visual Needle Knife Release in Treating Knee Osteoarthritis: A Meta-analysis
items.summary: A meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of visual needle knife release in treating knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 针刀可视化松解对膝骨关节炎的疗效仍需更多高质量证据支持。作为手法治疗的一种，它可能提供缓解，但请勿作为一线或替代核心康复方案。
items.titleZh: 可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性：一项Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项Meta分析评估了可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The effectiveness of visual needle knife release for knee osteoarthritis still requires more high-quality evidence. As a manual therapy, it may offer relief, but do not use it as a first-line or substitute for core rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 本Meta分析未报告纳入研究的具体数量和异质性，可能影响结果可靠性。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis does not report the specific number of included studies or heterogeneity, which may affect result reliability.

items.title: Specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence: A randomized controlled study
items.summary: A randomized controlled study investigated the effect of specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with nerve growth factor (NGF) for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence.
items.curatedReason: 卒中恢复期患者，穴位电刺激联合神经营养因子可能促进神经功能恢复。你可以关注电刺激与生物制剂结合的潜力，但这种联合疗法仍处于研究阶段。
items.titleZh: 特定模式穴位电刺激联合NGF促进缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复：一项随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究探讨了特定模式穴位电刺激联合神经营养因子（NGF）对缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: In patients with ischemic stroke during convalescence, specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF may promote neurological recovery. You can pay attention to the potential of combining electrical stimulation with biologics, but this combined therapy is still in the research stage.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量和具体结局指标未在摘要中明确说明。
items.limitationEn: The sample size and specific outcome measures of this study are not clearly stated in the abstract.

items.title: Healthcare professionals’ perspectives on implementing the H.O.M.E mobility intervention in acute care: a mixed-methods study
items.summary: A mixed-methods study explored healthcare professionals’ experiences and perceptions of implementing the H.O.M.E mobility intervention in acute care settings for older adults.
items.curatedReason: 医护人员对H.O.M.E移动干预的反馈，揭示了在急性护理环境中推行老年患者早期移动方案的实际挑战和可行性。这些见解对于你规划和落地老年患者的早期康复项目至关重要。
items.titleZh: 医护人员对急症护理中实施H.O.M.E移动干预的看法：一项混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究探讨了医护人员对在急症护理环境中实施H.O.M.E移动干预措施的经验和看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Healthcare professionals' feedback on the H.O.M.E mobility intervention highlights the practical challenges and feasibility of implementing early mobility programs for older adults in acute care settings. These insights are crucial for you when planning and deploying early rehabilitation programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项混合方法研究，主要关注医护人员的视角，而非干预本身的临床效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a mixed-methods study focusing on healthcare professionals' perspectives, not an evaluation of the intervention's clinical effectiveness.

items.title: Integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development: an integrative literature review
items.summary: An integrative literature review examined the integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development, focusing on educational pathways, competency expectations, and implementation conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于综合心肺康复护理劳动力发展的文献综述，揭示了当前教育路径、能力期望和实施条件存在的差距。作为物理治疗师，这提醒你关注跨专业协作，推动心肺康复团队的专业化发展。
items.titleZh: 综合心肺康复护理劳动力发展：一项综合性文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇综合性文献综述探讨了综合心肺康复护理劳动力的发展，重点关注教育途径、能力期望和实施条件。
items.curatedReasonEn: This integrative literature review on integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development highlights gaps in current educational pathways, competency expectations, and implementation conditions. As a physical therapist, this reminds you to focus on interprofessional collaboration and promote the professional development of cardiopulmonary rehabilitation teams.
items.limitation: 本综述侧重于护理劳动力，物理治疗师的角色和发展未被详细探讨。
items.limitationEn: This review focuses on the nursing workforce; the role and development of physical therapists are not detailed.

items.title: A randomized controlled trial of brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness.
items.curatedReason: 对于中重度肩关节僵硬患者，臂丛神经阻滞下手法松动与类固醇注射在意识清醒状态下均有效。这项研究提供了两种干预手段的直接对比证据，有助于你选择更适合患者的方案。
items.titleZh: 意识清醒患者臂丛神经阻滞手法松动与类固醇注射治疗中重度肩关节僵硬的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了意识清醒患者臂丛神经阻滞下手法松动与类固醇注射治疗中重度肩关节僵硬的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with moderate to severe shoulder stiffness, both brachial plexus block manipulation and steroid injection are effective in conscious patients. This study provides direct comparative evidence for both interventions, aiding your choice of the most suitable option for patients.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明意识清醒患者的疼痛管理细节和长期随访结果。
items.limitationEn: The study does not detail pain management specifics for conscious patients or long-term follow-up outcomes.

items.title: The Semmelweis Framework: structuring evidence foundations and expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines
items.summary: The Semmelweis Framework was developed as a methodological tool to structure expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines, particularly when evidence is scarce.
items.curatedReason: Semmelweis框架为临床实践指南中专家意见的结构化提供了新思路。在证据稀缺的情况下，采用标准化的方法整合专家意见，能提升指南的质量和可靠性。
items.titleZh: Semmelweis框架：临床实践指南中证据基础和专家意见的结构化方法
items.summaryZh: Semmelweis框架旨在作为一种方法学工具，用于在临床实践指南中，尤其是在证据稀缺时，结构化专家意见。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Semmelweis Framework offers a new approach to structuring expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines. Standardizing the integration of expert opinion, especially when evidence is scarce, can enhance guideline quality and reliability.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于框架的开发，并非针对特定临床指南的验证研究。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on framework development, not validation for specific clinical guidelines.

items.title: Adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training: a theory-driven study among women with pelvic floor disorders
items.summary: A theory-driven study explored adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training among women with pelvic floor disorders.
items.curatedReason: 生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练的依从性和持续意愿，对盆底功能障碍女性的长期康复至关重要。你需要关注影响患者依从性的理论因素，以优化干预策略。
items.titleZh: 生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练在盆底功能障碍女性中的依从性和持续意愿：一项理论驱动研究
items.summaryZh: 一项理论驱动研究探讨了生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练在盆底功能障碍女性中的依从性和持续意愿。
items.curatedReasonEn: Adherence and continuance intention to biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training are crucial for long-term rehabilitation in women with pelvic floor disorders. You need to consider theoretical factors influencing patient adherence to optimize intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 这是一项理论驱动的研究，侧重于依从性意愿，并非直接评估干预的临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a theory-driven study focusing on adherence intention, not directly assessing clinical efficacy of interventions.

items.title: Long-term clinical outcomes and complications after Open Reduction and Internal Fixation (ORIF) with locking plate for proximal humerus fractures: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the long-term clinical outcomes and complications after open reduction and internal fixation (ORIF) with locking plate for proximal humerus fractures.
items.curatedReason: 锁定钢板内固定治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期疗效和并发症已被系统性总结。这份综述是评估这种手术方案预后的良好参考，尤其是在与康复策略结合时。
items.titleZh: 锁定钢板切开复位内固定术治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期临床结果和并发症：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析探讨了锁定钢板切开复位内固定术治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期临床结果和并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: Long-term clinical outcomes and complications of locking plate open reduction and internal fixation for proximal humerus fractures have been systematically summarized. This review serves as a good reference for evaluating the prognosis of this surgical option, especially when combined with rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析可能受到纳入研究异质性的影响。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses can be affected by the heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: The efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive ...
items.summary: A three-level meta-analysis reviewed the efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive disorder due to another medical condition.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实（VR）干预对伴随其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者有一定疗效。作为一种辅助手段，VR在神经康复中也具备潜力，值得在临床实践中探索其应用边界。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实干预对伴随其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者的疗效：一项三级Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项三级Meta分析综述了虚拟现实干预对伴随其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality (VR) interventions show some efficacy for depressive disorder concomitant with other medical conditions. As an adjunctive tool, VR also holds potential in neurorehabilitation, and its application boundaries in clinical practice are worth exploring.
items.limitation: 三级Meta分析的具体纳入标准和异质性未在摘要中明确说明。
items.limitationEn: The specific inclusion criteria and heterogeneity of the three-level meta-analysis are not clearly stated in the abstract.
